git: Git ne relationship status complicated kar diya.
Git bhi trust nahi karta tujhe.
Shaadi se zyada conflicts hain tere code mein.
Commit message 'fix' likhne se kuch fix nahi hota.
Push force karega to dost push away ho jayenge.
Tumhara PR reject ho jayega bhai.
npm: Package install bhi nahi ho raha?
Node_modules ne give up kar diya.
Aaj production down karega kya npm se?
python: Space and tabs mix karega to narak jayega.
Python is easy they said. You made it hard.
docker: Container bhi isolate hona chahta hai tujhse.
Docker image build failed, just like your plans.
Container crash ho gaya, usko tera code pasand nahi aaya.
sudo: Root access chahiye? Pehle common sense access le.
Sudo will not save you from syntax errors.
With great power comes great responsibility, jo tere paas nahi hai.
rm: Data delete karne mein topper hai.
System32 delete mat kar dena galti se.
Jaldi me 'rm -rf /' type mat kar dena.
Bhai bach ke, tera laptop ud jayega.
mkdir: Directory banane mein bhi failure? Wah!
Naam to dhang ka soch le directory ka.
Folder nahi ban raha, career kaise banega?
cd: Rasta bhatak gaya kya terminal mein?
No such file or directory, just like your future.
Kahan jaana chahta hai bhai? Destination clearly bata.
ls: Khali dimaag aur khali directory, dono same hain.
Dikhega tabhi na jab kuch banaya hoga.
Aankhein khol ke dekh, kuch nahi hai wahan.
